Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension12-Jun-1995Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Patient will achieve and maintain blood pressure within target range through lifestyle changes as part of hypertension management.
Care plan11-Apr-1994Obstructive sleep apnea syndrome (disorder)
  • Reduce the Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour
  • Improve overall sleep quality as measured by patient-reported outcomes
  • Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale
  • Achieve CPAP usage of at least 4 hours per night on 70% of nights
Diabetes self management plan05-Jun-1989Prediabetes (finding)
  • Lose at least 5% of baseline body weight to reduce risk of progression to diabetes
  • Maintain or reduce HbA1c to less than 5.7%
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week
  • Follow a balanced diet with reduced intake of refined carbohydrates and saturated fats
  • Maintain fasting blood glucose below 100 mg/dL
